heading: The designer behind the work.
para1: I'm a product designer with over a decade of experience across agencies, startups, and in-house product teams. I've shipped work for companies across fintech, healthcare, travel, and SaaS — and learned that the best outcomes come from working closely with the people who know the business best.
para2: Based between Melbourne and Cairns, I take on a small number of focused projects at a time. This isn't an assembly line — every engagement gets my full attention and considered craft.
para3: I believe design should be invisible. The mark of excellent product design isn't that it's noticed — it's that everything feels frictionless and obvious. That's the standard I work to.
